sections.title: Overview
sections.text: ACME Cloud is an internal operations platform for managing customer workspaces, data exports, and support access. Administrators use the admin console to invite users, assign roles, review audit logs, and configure workspace-level settings.

sections.title: Access control
sections.text: To invite a teammate, open Settings, choose Access Control, and select Invite user. Admins can assign the Viewer, Operator, or Admin role. Role changes are recorded in the audit log immediately.

sections.title: Audit logs
sections.text: The Audit Logs page records sign-ins, role changes, workspace exports, and security configuration changes. Logs can be filtered by actor, event type, and date range.

title: ACME Cloud Security and SSO Guide

sections.title: SSO 设置
sections.text: ACME Cloud 支持通过 SAML 2.0 启用单点登录。管理员需要进入 Settings > Security > Single Sign-On，上传身份提供商的 metadata XML，然后把 ACS URL 和 Entity ID 复制回身份提供商。启用前建议先保留一个本地管理员账号作为应急入口。

sections.title: 多因素认证
sections.text: 多因素认证可以在 Settings > Security > Multi-Factor Authentication 中开启。开启后，所有新登录会要求使用一次性验证码。管理员可以为服务账号设置例外，但必须在审计日志中留下原因。

sections.title: 安全审计
sections.text: 安全相关事件会写入 Audit Logs，包括 SSO 配置变更、MFA 策略变更、管理员角色调整和失败登录尝试。安全团队通常每周导出一次审计日志用于合规检查。

sections.title: Invoices
sections.text: Invoices are generated on the first day of each month for the previous month's usage. Billing admins can download invoices from Billing > Invoices. If an invoice is missing, verify that the user has the Billing Admin role.

sections.title: Usage exports
sections.text: Usage exports include workspace name, project ID, storage consumed, and export job count. Exports are available as CSV files from Billing > Usage exports.

sections.title: Highlights
sections.text:
- Added CSV export for audit logs.
- Added workspace-level retention settings for usage exports.
- Improved SSO setup validation messages when metadata XML is invalid.

sections.title: Fixes
sections.text:
- Fixed an issue where Billing Admin users could see invoice totals but could not download the invoice PDF.
- Fixed a delay in audit log ingestion after role changes.
